title: machilus nanmu
intro: Machilus nanmu, also known as Chinese bay tree or nanmu, is a species of tree native to East Asia, belonging to the family Lauraceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Machilus nanmu include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
